description: Covers maternity and surgery with comprehensive postpartum care support.
eligibility: Women aged 18-65. Target group: Women / Mothers.
coverage: Coverage ₹50,000 – ₹5,00,000. Areas: Maternity, Surgery, Postpartum Care, Hospitalization.

description: Cash incentive scheme for pregnant and lactating mothers.
eligibility: Women aged 18+ pregnant with first child. Registered resident of India.
coverage: ₹5,000 cash benefit in 3 installments for maternal and child care.

description: Cash assistance for institutional delivery to reduce maternal and infant mortality.
eligibility: BPL pregnant women. Rural/urban areas as defined by NHM.
